Headline: Tesla Expands Mexico Capacity
Summary: Tesla announced a $5B investment in Mexico to build a new gigafactory. The facility will produce Model 3 and Model Y variants. This expansion supports North American EV growth.
Highlights: New manufacturing capacity supports growth; Competitive pressure increases; Supply chain resilience improved

Headline: BYD Becomes World's Largest EV Maker
Summary: BYD surpassed Tesla in total EV sales with 1.2M units sold in 2025. The Chinese OEM leads in battery technology and cost efficiency.
Highlights: China dominates EV market; Battery costs declining; Global competition intensifies

Headline: Volkswagen Partners with Samsung on Batteries
Summary: VW signed a joint venture with Samsung SDI to produce next-generation solid-state batteries. Production to begin in 2028.
Highlights: Technology advancement; Supply security; Cost reduction potential

Highlights: Geopolitical impact; Capacity reallocation; European focus shift
